#Text=Three Times Damian Tried To Steal Jason And One Time Dick Made Sure He Couldn't
#Text=One
#Text=Ever since Jason and Dick had gotten together, Damian had been running around trying to steal Jason away from Dick.
#Text=As a newly minted alpha, Damian's instincts were high and nearly uncontrollable.
#Text=He postured around every alpha he met, he preened in front of every omega, and none more than Jason Todd.
#Text=Damian's infatuation with Jason didn't entirely make sense, since Damian could barely stomach the man on a regular basis, but as soon as he'd presented it was like a switch had been flipped.
#Text=Dick didn't really care, if he was being honest.
#Text=He and Jason had been through too much together for him to ever be worried about Jason's loyalties.
#Text=Damian didn't hold a candle to what they had, and Dick knew it, so he felt no need to be mad at Damian.
#Text=Jason though?
#Text=Well, it made Jason absolutely furious.
#Text=At the moment Damian was bragging very loudly to Alfred about how he'd saved a bunch of kids the night before, all while Dick and Jason were sitting three feet away eating breakfast.
#Text="So then I untied the alpha boy and ordered him to help untie the others," Damian said, practically preening.
#Text=Jason was studiously ignoring him by reading the paper.
#Text=Dick, on the other hand, was enraptured.
#Text="Oh, Dami, that's incredible," He said.
#Text=Despite the fact that Dick was a beta, and Damian was an alpha, Dick still felt like it was his job to look after Damian, who was only thirteen.
#Text="What do you think Todd?"
#Text=Damian asked, staring holes in the newspaper, which Jason finally put down with a put upon sigh.
#Text="I think it's great Damian," He said blandly, and tried to go back to his newspaper, but Damian put his hand over it and moved closer.
#Text="You do?"
#Text=Damian asked sultrily.
#Text=Dick snorted into his coffee, and covered it with a cough.
#Text=Jason sighed.
#Text="Sure," He said.
#Text=Damian moved even closer, his lips pursed.
#Text=Jason flailed back so hard he nearly fell out of his chair.
#Text="Dammit Damian!"
#Text=He snapped, and stalked out of the room.
#Text="Don't worry Dami," Dick said.
#Text="I'll go talk to him."
#Text=He hopped off his bench and trailed after Jason, leaving a very flustered Damian behind.
#Text=Two
#Text=They were trying to take out Two-Face's men.
#Text=His goons were running all over Gotham creating havoc on half of the items in the city.
#Text=Half of buildings destroyed, half of cars covered in paint, half of people's hair shaved off.
#Text=It was a mess.
#Text=Red Hood and Robin were fighting a particularly tenacious band of goons by a church when Damian noticed one of them try to sneak up behind Jason.
#Text=Instead of going to fight the goon, Damian ran and slammed into Jason, shoving him to the ground and out of the way.
#Text=Jason grunted as he landed on his back on the ground, Damian crouched on top of him.
#Text="What the hell?"
#Text=Jason snapped.
#Text=Damian sat on Jason's stomach and grinned.
#Text=Jason tried awkwardly to shift his hips out of the way.
#Text="Don't worry Red Hood, I saved you," Damian said proudly.
#Text=Jason rolled his eyes so hard it hurt, not that Damian could actually see it.
#Text="You didn't save me Robin, you shoved me into the sidewalk."
#Text=Jason shoved Damian off of him, and stood up in a huff.
#Text=He stalked off in the direction of the goons, and tased one of them as he went.
#Text=It made him feel a little bit better.
#Text=Three
#Text=Damian had been locked in the dining room for nearly an hour, and frankly Dick was starting to get worried.
#Text=Before locking himself in the dining room he had spent three hours locked in the kitchen.
#Text=He'd finally had to unlock to door for Alfred because Alfred threatened to unscrew the hinges and break the door open.
#Text=Dick stood outside the dining room door and tried to listen through the thick mahogany, but he couldn't really hear much.
#Text=Just the clattering of plates and soft muttering.
#Text=After a moment Jason walked up beside him and greeted him with a kiss.
#Text="What's up?"
#Text=Jason asked.
#Text=Dick frowned.
#Text="What do you mean?"
#Text="You asked me to come down here.
#Text=Jason's eyebrows shot to his forehead.
#Text="He did what?"
#Text=At that moment Damian threw open the dining room doors and swept his arm back, gesturing to the candlelit table and slightly burnt quail resting on top of it next to a bouquet of roses.
#Text="Todd," he said.

column1: #Text="I have prepared a romantic dinner for the two of us.
#Text="Todd!"
#Text=Damian shouted after him, but Jason just kept walking, muttering "nope" the whole way back to his room.
#Text=+One
#Text=Dick and Jason had been more lovey-dovey than ever, and it was driving Damian absolutely up the wall.
#Text=He knew he was better than Dick; he was an alpha for gods sake.
#Text=He was automatically a better mate for Jason than Dick could ever be.
#Text=He walked past the living room, still fuming at having been brushed off from the date he'd prepared.
#Text=He stopped when he hear light laughter coming from the living room.
#Text=He stormed in and saw Jason and Dick practically attacking each other's face's on the couch.
#Text="Grayson!

column1: #Text=Dick broke into a ear splitting grin and looked at Jason.
#Text="He said congratulations," he said.
#Text="He said he'd give up," Jason replied with a smile.
